oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Wildlife Center of Virginia in Pictures
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Aviculture, American Federation of
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 49 Number 4 (October/November 2022).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.www.wildlifecenter.org The Wildlife Center of Virginia was formed in 1982 to provide quality health care, often on an emergency basis, to native wildlife. They were kind enough to share pictures of some of the work they are doing with falcons for inclusion in Watchbird.Good eyesight is critical to a falcon’s ability to survive in the wild.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 49 No. 4 (2022): Watchbird October/November 2022; 19
